SEARCH
Package com.example.myapplication

Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.example.myapplication.Event
public class Event extends Object
Model class representing an event in the application. This class is used as a data model throughout the app and maps directly to documents in the Firestore "events" collection. It follows a simple pattern with getters and setters for all fields.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Event()
    Empty constructor required by Firebase Firestore for automatic deserialization of documents into Event objects.
    Event(String id, String title, String descirption, String location, com.google.firebase.Timestamp regStart, com.google.firebase.Timestamp regEnd, String posterURL, String qrValue, int capacity, String dateEvent, String organizerName, String eventType, int maxWaitingListSize)
    Parameterized constructor for creating a fully populated Event object.

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event()
      Empty constructor required by Firebase Firestore for automatic deserialization of documents into Event objects.

    • Event

      public Event(String id, String title, String descirption, String location, com.google.firebase.Timestamp regStart, com.google.firebase.Timestamp regEnd, String posterURL, String qrValue, int capacity, String dateEvent, String organizerName, String eventType, int maxWaitingListSize)
      Parameterized constructor for creating a fully populated Event object.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique Firestore document ID
      title - the name of the event
      descirption - a description of the event
      location - the physical location of the event
      regStart - the registration start timestamp
      regEnd - the registration end timestamp
      posterURL - URL of the event poster image
      qrValue - the QR code value used to identify this event
      capacity - maximum number of attendees
      dateEvent - the date the event takes place (as a String)
      organizerName - the name of the event organizer
      eventType - the type/category of the event
      maxWaitingListSize - maximum number of entrants allowed on the waiting list

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns:
      the unique Firestore document ID for this event

    • setId

      public void setId(String id)
      Parameters:
      id - the unique Firestore document ID to set

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns:
      the title/name of the event

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title)
      Parameters:
      title - the title/name of the event to set

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Returns:
      the description of the event

    • setDescription

      public void setDescription(String descirption)
      Parameters:
      descirption - the description of the event to set

    • getLocation

      public String getLocation()
      Returns:
      the physical location of the event

    • setLocation

      public void setLocation(String location)
      Parameters:
      location - the physical location of the event to set

    • getRegStart

      public com.google.firebase.Timestamp getRegStart()
      Returns:
      the registration start timestamp

    • setRegStart

      public void setRegStart(com.google.firebase.Timestamp regStart)
      Parameters:
      regStart - the registration start timestamp to set

    • getRegEnd

      public com.google.firebase.Timestamp getRegEnd()
      Returns:
      the registration end timestamp

    • setRegEnd

      public void setRegEnd(com.google.firebase.Timestamp regEnd)
      Parameters:
      regEnd - the registration end timestamp to set

    • getPosterURL

      public String getPosterURL()
      Returns:
      the URL of the event poster image

    • setPosterURL

      public void setPosterURL(String posterURL)
      Parameters:
      posterURL - the URL of the event poster image to set

    • getQrValue

      public String getQrValue()
      Returns:
      the QR code value used to identify and navigate to this event

    • setQrValue

      public void setQrValue(String qrValue)
      Parameters:
      qrValue - the QR code value to set

    • getCapacity

      public int getCapacity()
      Returns:
      the maximum number of attendees for this event

    • setCapacity

      public void setCapacity(int capacity)
      Parameters:
      capacity - the maximum number of attendees to set

    • getDateEvent

      public String getDateEvent()
      Returns:
      the date the event takes place as a formatted String

    • setDateEvent

      public void setDateEvent(String dateEvent)
      Parameters:
      dateEvent - the event date string to set

    • getOrganizerName

      public String getOrganizerName()
      Returns:
      the name of the event organizer

    • setOrganizerName

      public void setOrganizerName(String organizerName)
      Parameters:
      organizerName - the name of the event organizer to set

    • getEventType

      public String getEventType()
      Returns:
      the type/category of the event (e.g. "Sports", "Music")

    • setEventType

      public void setEventType(String eventType)
      Parameters:
      eventType - the type/category of the event to set

    • getMaxWaitingListSize

      public int getMaxWaitingListSize()
      Returns:
      the maximum number of entrants allowed on the waiting list

    • setMaxWaitingListSize

      public void setMaxWaitingListSize(int spotsToFill)
      Parameters:
      spotsToFill - the maximum waiting list size to set

    • getGeolocationRequired

      public boolean getGeolocationRequired()
      Returns:
      true if geolocation is required for this event, false otherwise

    • setGeolocationRequired

      public void setGeolocationRequired(boolean geolocationRequired)
      Parameters:
      geolocationRequired - true to require geolocation, false to disable it

    • isRegistrationOpen

      public boolean isRegistrationOpen()
      Checks whether registration for this event is currently open. Registration is considered open if the current time is after regStart and before or equal to regEnd.
      Returns:
      true if registration is currently open, false otherwise
